button.name: %(ir_action_create_condominium)d
button.invisible: company_type == 'person' or ref_company_ids or not x_is_main_company

field.name: x_studio_used_for_categorization
field.help: When checked, the line can be selected to be assigned to an expense as a category for Condominium Balance Sheet reporting

field.name: x_studio_period_start
field.help: Used to distribute costs by meter; closest meter reading date used

field.name: x_studio_period_end
field.help: Used to distribute costs by meter; closest meter reading date used
